title: Text Quote / Block Quote (Partial Text Selection for Reply)
description: Users can select a specific substring of a message text and quote only that excerpt in a reply, rather than quoting the entire message. The quoted fragment appears as a highlighted block quote above the reply. This is distinct from full-message reply: it carries a reference to the original message id AND a byte-range (offset, length) within the original text.

quote_block_schema.quote_offset: INTEGER — UTF-16 code unit start position in original text
quote_block_schema.quote_length: INTEGER — UTF-16 code unit length of selected text
quote_block_schema.quote_text: TEXT — denormalized snapshot of quoted fragment (up to 1024 chars)
quote_block_schema.quote_entities: JSONB[] — formatting entities from original scoped to the quote range

data_model.denormalization_rationale: quote_text is stored to survive original message edit/deletion. Recipients see the quoted text as it was at time of reply, not current state — ensures conversational coherence.

server_validation: quote_offset + quote_length ≤ len(original_message.text) — prevents out-of-bounds quote.
quote_length ≤ 1024 chars — prevents DoS via huge quotes.
quote_text must match original_message.text[offset:offset+length] at time of send (server recomputes and validates, client-provided text is advisory only — server's value wins).
original_message_id must belong to the same conversation.
original_message must not be deleted (if deleted: reject with 404, client should gracefully degrade to full reply).

security.fake_quote_attack: Malicious client sends quote_text that differs from actual message to create false impressions. Mitigated: server validates quote_text against live message content and overwrites client value with server-computed substring. Client's quote_text is NEVER trusted.
security.edit_after_quote: Original message edited after being quoted: stored quote_text remains as snapshot. No retroactive update to quote blocks — by design.

ui.text_selection_trigger: Long-press message text → text selection handles appear → drag to select substring → context menu shows 'Quote' option
ui.quote_preview_in_composer: Selected text appears in composer as styled blockquote with original sender name. User can dismiss or keep.

rendered_quote_bubble.style: Left-bordered colored block (sender's accent color), truncated to 3 lines with expand option
rendered_quote_bubble.tap_action: Scroll to original message and highlight
